title: pelargonium × succulentum
intro: Pelargonium × succulentum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, known for its distinctive rose-like fragrance. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Rose Geranium include reduced stress and anxiety, improved sleep quality, and relief from menstrual cramps and other digestive issues. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are available in various forms to suit individual needs and preferences.
